$comment: OPTIONAL profile for feivpnctl. You usually do NOT need this file —
`feivpnctl ensure-ready` auto-registers the device with the backend
on first run via /getid and caches the subscribe_url under
Use this file only when you want to override the auto-bootstrapped
- pin a specific egress country via `preferred_country`
(ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; run `feivpnctl countries` to list options)
- change the TUN address (`tun_addr`) when 10.111.222.0/24 collides
